---
title: "U.S. Labor Market Trends (2011-2024)"
author: "Shahlan Finchan"
date: "2026-02-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r load-data}
library(tidyverse)

# Load Table 8 data
data <- read_csv("Table_8_Data.csv")

glimpse(data)
```
